items.question: What's included in a "standard" service call?
items.answer: Our standard rate covers the first hour of labor & a basic diagnostic. Parts, materials, and additional time are quoted separately—no surprises.

items.question: Do you serve areas outside Bernalillo County (e.g., Rio Rancho, Edgewood)?
items.answer: Yes! We cover Albuquerque, Rio Rancho, Corrales, Placitas, Edgewood & more. Travel fees may apply for locations beyond 30 miles from our shop.

items.question: Can I get a quote if my project involves "unusual" materials—like reclaimed wood or antique fixtures?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have worked with reclaimed wood, antique hardware, custom tile & more. Send us photos and we will put together a detailed estimate.
